name: Apple
description: Fresh red apples with a crisp bite and natural sweetness.
details: Perfect for snacks, pies, and smoothies. Sourced from local orchards and packed the same day.

name: Banana
description: Yellow bananas with a creamy texture and sweet flavor.
details: Ideal for breakfast, baking, or quick energy on the go. Rich in potassium and vitamin B6.

name: Orange
description: Juicy oranges bursting with bright citrus flavor.
details: Great for fresh juice, fruit salads, or a vitamin C boost. Smooth skin with easy peeling.

name: Grapes
description: Seedless grapes with a sweet, refreshing crunch.
details: Perfect for snacking and cheese platters. Keep chilled for the best texture.

name: Mango
description: Ripe mangoes with smooth, fragrant flesh.
details: Excellent in smoothies, desserts, and salads. Naturally sweet and richly aromatic.

name: Pineapple
description: Tropical pineapple with bright, tangy sweetness.
details: Great for grilling, juicing, or fruit bowls. Peel carefully and enjoy the juicy texture.

name: Strawberry
description: Sweet strawberries with fragrant, ruby-red berries.
details: Perfect for desserts, jams, or a fresh snack. Keep refrigerated for maximum freshness.

name: Watermelon
description: Hydrating watermelon with juicy, crisp slices.
details: Perfect for summer picnics, salads, and refreshing drinks. Best served chilled.

name: Blueberry
description: Plump blueberries with sweet and slightly tangy flavor.
details: Ideal for baking, smoothies, or topping cereals. Packed with antioxidants.

name: Kiwi
description: Bright green kiwi with tangy, tropical flavor.
details: Use in fruit salads, desserts, or enjoy raw with a spoon. High in vitamin C and fiber.
